description: Perfect logo integration across the entire website - larger navbar/footer logos with gold glow hover, prominent hero section logo, favicon setup, and sharp rendering on all backgrounds.
steps: Update src/components/Navbar.tsx: Increase logo from w-16 h-16 to w-[84px] h-[84px] (approx 30% larger), add gold glow hover effect and scale(1.03-1.05) animation
Update src/components/sections/HeroSection.tsx: Add prominent logo above the main heading with larger size and gold glow
Update src/components/Footer.tsx: Increase logo size to w-20 h-20, add premium hover effect
Update src/app/layout.tsx: Add favicon/icons metadata using the logo
Update src/app/globals.css: Add logo-glow hover animation class
Ensure logo visibility on dark navy backgrounds with white bg circle
acceptance_criteria: Navbar logo is 25-40% larger than current 64px
Logo has subtle premium gold glow on hover
Hero section displays logo prominently above the heading
Footer logo is larger with professional branding
Sharp quality maintained on desktop and mobile
Logo visible on dark navy backgrounds
npm run build completes without errors
verification: Run cd /projects/sandbox/deekshi-global-exim && npm run build to confirm no TypeScript or build errors
findings: Build passes cleanly. All 5 files modified: Navbar logo increased from 64px to 84px (31% larger), Footer logo increased from 64px to 80px (25% larger), Hero section now has a prominent 112-128px logo with animated gold pulse glow, favicon configured using logo.png with apple-touch-icon support, and CSS adds logo-glow hover (scale 1.04 with gold box-shadow) and logo-hero-glow (pulsing gold animation). White bg circle behind logo ensures visibility on dark navy backgrounds. Pre-existing viewport metadata warnings remain unchanged.
